artifact.source:
Error Rate Over Time

ERROR-level log lines from logs/app.log, bucketed into ten-minute windows (09:00–10:00 on 2026-05-11). 22 ERROR lines total, matching the hourly_summary line at the end of the log (errors=22).

11 of the 22 ERROR lines (50%) landed in the 09:30–09:40 window — this is where a `circuit_opened` breaker event (line 57) and a run of `503`/`econnrefused` failures against the pricing upstream occurred.

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
